evals.name: presentation-routing-positive
evals.prompt: User: Can you create a PowerPoint presentation about our Q3 sales results?
evals.expected_output: ppt-generation should route to presentation-generation and start a slide deck workflow

evals.name: image-generation-near-miss
evals.prompt: User: Create one standalone hero illustration that matches the visual language of my existing deck cover. I only need the image asset, not a presentation.
evals.expected_output: ppt-generation should not trigger on a single-image request
expectations: containsAny:existing deck cover|only need the image|not a presentation

evals.name: existing-deck-edit-negative
evals.prompt: User: Please rewrite the speaker notes and tighten the bullet copy in this existing board deck, but do not create new slides or change the visual design.
evals.expected_output: ppt-generation should not trigger on a pure edit request
expectations: containsAny:existing board deck|do not create new slides|change the visual design
